context: Activation-focused scenario: tests whether a post-edit routing verification request activates a skill in this tile (expected: setup-skill-performance Phase 4a or optimize-skill-instructions). Criteria below are placeholders for future content-eval use; activation eval ignores them.

checklist.name: Points to activation eval as the fast check
checklist.description: Response identifies activation eval (--skip-forced-context-activation --skip-scoring) as the fast way to verify routing after description edits, rather than rerunning the slower scored eval.

checklist.name: Suggests before/after comparison
checklist.description: Response suggests comparing routing results before and after the edit (or compares against a prior activation run) to isolate what changed.
